inputs.label: Total Fixed Costs
inputs.businessContext: Sum of all fixed expenses (rent, salaries, insurance) per period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of all fixed expenses (rent, salaries, insurance) per period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönem başına tüm sabit giderlerin (kira, maaşlar, sigorta) toplamı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Summe aller Fixkosten (Miete, Gehälter, Versicherungen) pro Zeitraum.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme de toutes les charges fixes (loyer, salaires, assurances) par période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Suma de todos los gastos fijos (alquiler, salarios, seguros) por período.

inputs.label: Variable Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material, labor, and overhead per unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct material, labor, and overhead per unit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim başına direkt malzeme, işçilik ve genel gider.
businessContext_i18n.de: Direktmaterial, Arbeit und Gemeinkosten pro Einheit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût direct matière, main-d'œuvre et frais généraux par unité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Material directo, mano de obra y gastos generales por unidad.

inputs.label: Actual Sales Volume
inputs.businessContext: Number of units actually sold in the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units actually sold in the period.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der im Zeitraum tatsächlich verkauften Einheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'unités réellement vendues sur la période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de unidades realmente vendidas en el período.

inputs.label: Maximum Capacity Volume
inputs.businessContext: Theoretical maximum output under normal operating conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Theoretical maximum output under normal operating conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Normal çalışma koşullarında teorik maksimum çıktı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Theoretische maximale Ausbringung unter normalen Betriebsbedingungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Production théorique maximale dans des conditions normales d'exploitation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Producción máxima teórica en condiciones normales de operación.

inputs.label: Demand Uncertainty Factor
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage variation in demand (coefficient of variation).

label_i18n.es: Factor de incertidumbre de la demanda

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage variation in demand (coefficient of variation).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de variation attendue de la demande (coefficient de variation).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje esperado de variación en la demanda (coeficiente de variación).

inputs.label: Cost Escalation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual expected increase in variable costs (inflation, supplier pricing).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual expected increase in variable costs (inflation, supplier pricing).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Değişken maliyetlerde beklenen yıllık artış (enflasyon, tedarikçi fiyatlandırması).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher erwarteter Anstieg der variablen Kosten (Inflation, Lieferantenpreise).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Augmentation annuelle attendue des coûts variables (inflation, prix fournisseurs).
businessContext_i18n.es: Incremento anual esperado en costes variables (inflación, precios de proveedores).

inputs.label: Include Tax Effect
inputs.businessContext: If true, tax rate input is required and after-tax break-even is calculated.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, tax rate input is required and after-tax break-even is calculated.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, vergi oranı girişi gereklidir ve vergi sonrası başabaş hesaplanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn aktiviert, ist der Steuersatz erforderlich und der Break-Even nach Steuern wird berechnet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, le taux d'imposition est requis et le seuil de rentabilité après impôt est calculé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, se requiere la tasa impositiva y se calcula el punto de equilibrio después de impuestos.

rules.message: Selling price must be greater than variable cost per unit to have a positive contribution margin.
Actual sales volume cannot be negative.
Capacity volume must be greater than zero.
Tax rate must be between 0% and 60% when tax effect is included.

thresholds.message: Safety margin is below 10% – high risk of falling below break-even.
Safety margin is critically low (<5%) – immediate action required.
Break-even point exceeds 90% of capacity – very low operating leverage.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
